productDisplayName: Lotto Men Sting II Black Sandal
description: These floater sandals from lotto with black, white and grey coloured straps are perfect for those who want to explore the great outdoors. Wear this with casual tees and bermudas or denims. Upper Interconnected ankle straps and midfoot straps made of woven fabric Adjustable ankle straps with velcro fastening Cushioned rubber footbed stitched to the outsole with scorpion print on footbed Outsole TPU rubber outsole with patterned lugs for grip and traction Sandal care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
